question: For the online platform, which interpretation best reflects what can (and cannot) be inferred from the 100% stacked bar chart?

options.A: All metrics follow the same trend over the year because each bar sums to 100%.
options.B: The combined height of all segments shows overall platform performance improving across the year.
options.C: Q2 has the highest number of advertisements clicked compared to the other quarters.
options.D: Percentages allow valid within-quarter ranking of metrics, but not comparison of their absolute quantities across quarters.

explanation: 100% stacking normalizes unrelated categories to 100% within each quarter. Valid inferences include within-quarter ranking (e.g., one metric > another in every quarter). Invalid inferences include cross-quarter total comparisons or combining unrelated categories.
